title: hylocereus trigonus
intro: Hylocereus trigonus, also known as the night-blooming cereus or queen of the night, is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Hylocereus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hylocereus trigonus include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Hylocereus trigonus include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
